title: FINAL FANTASY VIII

notes:
Runs perfectly aside from sound. Here is how to fix the sound quickly and hassle free for the most part. Install winetricks then use this command WINEPREFIX="/home/<yourusername>/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/39150/pfx" winetricks
This will launch you into winetricks. When the window pops up click on select default prefix then click ok. Now select Install a Windows DLL or Component then click okay. Once you are in to the DLL/Component area check the boxes that say Directmusic and Directplay then hit ok. This will install the everything you need for the background music to work. After the install is complete close out of winetricks and launch game.
title: FINAL FANTASY VIII

title: FINAL FANTASY VIII

notes: Runs perfectly, Just install winetricks and open console and paste this command "WINEPREFIX="/home/<yourusername>/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/39150/pfx" and select install windows DLL or components, install directplay and music this is make music work, if you want tomberry mods to work just go to winecfg and type "d3d9", the performance drop isn't too noticeable.
title: FINAL FANTASY VIII
